seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly 150-200 words.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 300 words.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must contain exactly 150-200 words. The email must contain at least 300 words.
response:
Subject: Urgent Request for Project Extension – [Your Name] – CS101

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well and that you are having a productive week in your department. I am writing to you today with deep respect and a sincere desire to ensure the highest quality work is submitted for our upcoming project assignment, which is scheduled to be turned in exactly two days from today's date. Unfortunately, due to an unforeseen personal medical emergency that has arisen within my family, I find myself facing significant challenges in meeting the current deadline without compromising the integrity of my final report or the research components required by our course syllabus. This situation was not anticipated when I began planning my initial schedule, and despite working tirelessly over the past forty-eight hours, I simply do not have sufficient time to complete every necessary aspect perfectly as originally outlined.

It is my fervent hope that we can discuss the possibility of extending the submission window by an additional four days to allow me to properly finalize all data analysis sections while also including the additional references that are now becoming clear once more time has been spent on preliminary literature reviews. This adjustment would enable me to submit a document that truly reflects the extensive effort put into understanding complex theoretical frameworks presented during our recent lectures and seminar discussions held last week. I understand fully that academic deadlines serve an important purpose in maintaining rigorous standards across the entire program, yet failing to meet them does not mean accepting lower-quality output rather than striving continuously toward excellence under slightly modified conditions.

Please let me know if there is an appropriate time this coming Thursday afternoon where we could briefly discuss how best to move forward given these circumstances. I am eager to demonstrate not just compliance but also commitment through superior results should the timeline change accommodate my needs temporarily. Thank you very much for considering my request; I appreciate your guidance and support throughout my university journey so far.<|im_end|>
final_answer:
